CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-18-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Judge Bruce E. Chan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Lawrence McLaughlin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service.
Tom Kirschner, Vice President of plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service.
Michael
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Rebeca Hernandez, a/k/a Rebeca Garcia, who was placed under oath and exmained.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 20, 2009.
Settlement agreement of the parties was placed on the record by Mr. McLaughlin. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, Judgment shall issue for plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service, and against defendant Rebeca Hernandez, a/k/a Rebeca Garcia, in the amount of $7,085.04. Entry of Judgment is stayed, and the outstanding balance owed by defendant Rebeca Hernandez, a/k/a Rebeca Garcia, shall be reduced to $4,000.00, which shall be paid by defendant Rebeca Hernandez, a/k/a Rebeca Garcia, as follows: Commencing May 4, 2009, and continuing on the 4th day of each month thereafter, defendant shall pay plaintiff $500.00 per month until the balance is paid in full. Plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service, shall dismiss this matter, with prejudice, provided defendant Rebeca Hernandez, a/k/a Rebeca Garcia, pays the outstanding balance $4,000.00 in full.
If defendant fails to comply with the terms set forth above, plaintiff, may, after a five (5) day grace period in which defendant may cure the default, and with prior notice to counsel for defendant, obtain entry of judgment.
Defendant was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understanding of this agreement. Terms of this Agreement will not be reduced to writing.
Matter is continued to May 18, 2010 @ 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
